name: ml-training-debugger
description: Diagnose machine learning training failures including loss divergence, mode collapse, gradient issues, architecture problems, and optimization failures. This skill spawns a specialist ML debugging ...
capabilities: Analyze training logs and loss curves for pathological patterns
Diagnose mode collapse, loss divergence, and gradient issues
Identify architecture imbalances in model parameters
Propose evidence-based fixes with confidence scores
author: DNYoussef
securitySummary: Pure prompt-based skill with no executable code. Operates in read-only mode analyzing training artifacts to diagnose failures. All capabilities are transparent in documentation. No network calls, credential access, or malicious patterns detected after evaluation.
valueStatement: ML training often fails with unclear causes. This skill spawns a specialist agent that systematically analyzes training logs, loss curves, and model code to identify root causes like learning rate issues, mode collapse, or architecture problems.
limitations: Cannot modify code directly (read-only analysis only)
Requires training artifacts to be provided
Cannot access GPU or runtime training environment

useCases.title: Debug Training Divergence
useCases.description: Diagnose why loss started increasing at epoch 7 and identify the learning rate issue.

useCases.title: Fix Mode Collapse
useCases.description: Understand why model outputs only one token and how to rebalance architecture.

useCases.title: Analyze Gradient Problems
useCases.description: Investigate exploding or vanishing gradients in deep neural networks.

promptTemplates.title: Basic Loss Issue
promptTemplates.prompt: My training loss is not decreasing. Analyze my training logs and help identify the root cause.

promptTemplates.title: Epoch Failure
promptTemplates.prompt: My model was training fine until epoch 7, then loss started increasing. Debug this.

promptTemplates.title: Model Output Issue
promptTemplates.prompt: My model only outputs the same token regardless of input. Help diagnose mode collapse.

promptTemplates.title: Full Analysis
promptTemplates.prompt: Debug my training failure. Symptoms: [describe]. Available artifacts: [list files]. Provide root cause analysis with evidence.

bestPractices: Provide training logs, loss curves, and model code for accurate diagnosis
Include error messages and symptom descriptions
Specify when failure occurred (epoch, step, iteration)
Request confidence levels and evidence for each diagnosis
antiPatterns: Asking for fixes without providing training artifacts
Expecting the skill to modify code directly
Requesting diagnosis without clear symptom description
Assuming the skill can access GPU or runtime environment

faq.question: What ML frameworks does this skill support?
faq.answer: Focuses on PyTorch but diagnosis methodology applies to any deep learning framework.

faq.question: What artifacts does the skill need to analyze?
faq.answer: Training logs, loss curves (CSV), model code, hyperparameter config, and error messages.

faq.question: Can this skill fix the issues it finds?
faq.answer: No, it provides diagnosis and recommendations. Use ml-expertise skill to implement fixes.

faq.question: Is my training data accessed?
faq.answer: No. The skill only analyzes logs, metrics, and code. Training data is never accessed.

faq.question: What if the skill cannot diagnose the issue?
faq.answer: It will request specific artifacts or suggest escalation paths for complex issues.

faq.question: How is this different from general code debugging?
faq.answer: Specializes in ML-specific patterns: loss curves, gradients, optimizer dynamics, and architecture issues.
